summary: Incomplete deliverable. Missing critical files: config/*.json, tests/fixtures/*, test_license_checker.py—workflow will fail immediately. Improper use of continue-on-error: true (lines 44, 51) masks license check failures. license_checker.py lacks error handling (no file validation, exception handling). Significant duplication: lines 41-56 (nearly identical package.json/requirements.txt steps), lines 70-88 (test-fixtures job). run_act_tests.py hardcodes '10 passed' expectation without providing test file. No actionlint validation demonstrated. Cannot run through act or validate structure—deliverable non-functional.
